---
title: "LQAS Monitoring Dashboard"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)

dt <- fread("../data/final/lqas_dashboard_input.csv")

total_records <- nrow(dt)
pass_count <- sum(dt$status == "Pass", na.rm = TRUE)
fail_count <- sum(dt$status == "Fail", na.rm = TRUE)
pass_rate <- round(pass_count / total_records * 100, 1)
```

Overview
=======================================================================

### Total Records {.value-box}

```{r}
valueBox(format(total_records, big.mark = ","), icon = "fa-database", color = "primary")
```

### Pass Rate {.value-box}

```{r}
valueBox(paste0(pass_rate, "%"), icon = "fa-check-circle", color = ifelse(pass_rate >= 80, "success", "warning"))
```

### Pass/Fail {.value-box}

```{r}
valueBox(paste(pass_count, "/", fail_count), icon = "fa-chart-simple", color = "info")
```

Column {data-width=350}
-------------------------------------

### Pass/Fail Distribution

```{r}
ggplot(dt, aes(x = status, fill = status)) +
  geom_bar() +
  geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), vjust = -0.5, size = 6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pass" = "#2ecc71", "Fail" = "#e74c3c"))
```

### Data Sample

```{r}
DT::datatable(head(dt[, 1:8], 100), options = list(scrollX = TRUE))
```
